calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motoin To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRUCE MARCUCCI'S Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs is GRANTED. The memorandum of costs, filed on September 19, 2014, is stricken in its entirety as untimely. Cal. Rule of Court 3.1700(a)(1) provides that a "prevailing party who claims costs must serve and file a memorandum of costs within 15 days after the date of mailing of the notice of entry of judgment." The notice of entry of judgment was mailed on August 26, 2014. The memorandum of costs was filed (and served on the wrong address) on September 19, 2014, beyond the 15 day period. Although Cal. Rule of Court 3.1700(b)(3) permits the Court to extend the times for serving the memorandum of costs, Plaintiff provides no explanation as to why the memorandum of costs was not timely filed, and therefore, the Court declines to extend the time. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BERNARDO'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees is Granted. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $17,500.00 within 30 days of entry of this Order. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
